valuations.name: root
valuations.use_case: TAO staking, validator rewards, network security
risk_flags: 🟡 Speculative — no OpEx data, purely option value
valuations.notes: Not a subnet token — value = PV of all future subnet emissions + staking yield. Metcalfe's Law × network growth.
